Wardrobe product shots - image-conditioned local pipeline

75 garments from 20 outfits. Qwen3-VL two-pass describe -> SAM2 white-balanced cutout -> OminiControl subject-conditioned FLUX schnell. Local, ~25s/garment, $0.
